landing.headline: Fix anything. Fear nothing.
landing.subheadline: Point your camera at a broken household item. FixAura diagnoses the issue, lists your tools, and guides you step-by-step with AR overlays.
landing.ctaBannerSubtitle: Start with a quick scan — no account required.

capture.title: Scan the problem
capture.instruction: Align the broken part inside the frame
capture.permissionBody: Allow camera access so FixAura can scan and diagnose your repair.
capture.errorBody: We couldn't access your camera. Check permissions or try another device.
capture.unsafeLighting: Lighting looks too dim — move to a brighter area for a clearer scan.
capture.unstableMotion: Hold steady — motion detected. Pause before capturing.

tools.title: Gather your tools
tools.subtitle: Check off each item before you begin.
tools.acknowledgeEssential: Acknowledge all essential tools to continue

completion.title: Repair complete
completion.subtitle: You did it — great work staying safe and thorough.

safety.powerOff: Turn off power at the breaker before continuing.
safety.waterShutoff: Shut off water supply before disassembly.
safety.gloves: Wear protective gloves for this step.

fallback.title: We're not fully confident
fallback.body: The image may be unclear or the issue unusual. Retake a well-lit photo, or continue with caution.
